facebook.caption:
4.8 stars. 2,589 reviews. Salinda Resort Phu Quoc Island keeps earning both.

Beachfront. Three restaurants. A full spa. A cocktail lounge that actually delivers. This is what a Phu Quoc resort stay looks like when nothing feels rushed.

Cửa Lấp, Phú Quốc. Book it before the shoulder season crowds arrive.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Poolside at Salinda Resort Phu Quoc Island. The ocean is right there. The cocktail lounge is right there. 2,589 people gave it 4.8 stars for a reason. Watch this and tell me you don't want in.
